HITS OF 2006
2006 PREDICTIONS BY MR.K.B.GOPALAKRISHNAN, LEADING ASTROLOGER
HOW WILL BE INDIA INC-
• It has been my privilege to predict astrologically, from 2002 the yearly predictions of
India. Many predictions have come true for the subsequent years from 2002, 2003,
2004, and 2005. The fundamental question is how is India Inc is going to be this year.
Positive growth oriented symbolically green light.
• Relationship with Pakistan - there will be no war. As usual diplomatic speeches, plus
there will be border tensions and infiltration of terrorists, mass death due to the attacks.
On the positive side more road links, other forms of diplomacy and increase in trade,
bilateral and cooperation.
